name: Frozen Domain of the Ice Barrier
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>氷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>結</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>に<ruby lang="jp"><rb>至</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いた</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>る<ruby lang="jp"><rb>晶</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>域</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Crystalline Domain Leading to the Ice Barrier
desc: Your opponent cannot activate cards or effects in response to the activation of your "Ice Barrier" monster effects. If a monster(s) is Special Summoned from the Extra Deck (except during the Damage Step): You can return to the hand or shuffle into the Deck, 1 "Ice Barrier" monster you control, then you can place 1 card from the field or either GY on the bottom of the Deck. You can only use this effect of "Frozen Domain of the Ice Barrier" once per turn. Once per turn, during your End Phase: Reveal 3 "Ice Barrier" monsters with different names in your Extra Deck or destroy this card.
eff: Your opponent cannot activate cards or effects in response to the activation of your "Ice Barrier" monster effects. If a monster(s) is Special Summoned from the Extra Deck (except during the Damage Step): You can return to the hand or shuffle into the Deck, 1 "Ice Barrier" monster you control, then you can place 1 card from the field or either GY on the bottom of the Deck. You can only use this effect of "Frozen Domain of the Ice Barrier" once per turn. Once per turn, during your End Phase: Reveal 3 "Ice Barrier" monsters with different names in your Extra Deck or destroy this card.

action: Returns from your field to your hand
Returns from your field to your Deck
Places cards from the player's field on the bottom of the Deck
Places cards from the opponent's field on the bottom of the Deck
Places cards from the player's Graveyard on the bottom of the Deck
Places cards from the opponent's Graveyard on the bottom of the Deck
mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
